name: Control Room
description: A circular room surrounds a polished stone dais covered in glowing glyphs and bronze controls unlike anything else
within the complex. Strange symbols pulse softly beneath a thin layer of dust while crystal lenses continue projecting
silent streams of light across the chamber. The air hums with quiet anticipation.
Your mage and priest exchange uneasy glances.
Neither is certain whether they stand before a sacred altar... or a machine.TODO: AI Text
